text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, during the lead-up to the Oka Sho—the
first race of the Triple Tiara tour...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: We're going out. There's somewhere I wanna go!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: You decide!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'm only going to tell you what kind of place I wanna go to. You have to decide where.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: And you have to pick somewhere that meets all the conditions I give you! Got it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I manage to find somewhere that meets the
conditions she gives me—in other words,
somewhere with a lot of flowers and full of
magical power.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... I think this place'll do. It's nowhere near
as nice as Granny's garden, though!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Come along, Familiar! I realized a while ago that
you know hardly anything about flowers.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Now that you've ranked up, you need to learn
about this kind of thing! Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After Sweep Tosho has spent a short while telling
me about the kinds of magic that various flowers
possess...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, Familiar?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I think you hold the first clue to me finding that
racing magic.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: You think it looks like magic when I run, right?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Then you have to tell me more. Directly.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: How do you feel when you see me run?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Your answers really should have ranked up with
you, by the way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has a point. In her eyes, I've become a
high-ranking familiar.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I could only really offer my vague impressions
before. This time, though...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh. Go on.
choice_data_list:
I get excited because it feels like something
new is about to begin.

I get excited because it feels like something
new is about to begin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's like everything I've seen before gets blown
away, and the world gets repainted with new
colors.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's the way I feel every time I see her run.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: (It's the same.)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
(That's exactly how I feel whenever I see Granny
casting magic...)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...I knew it. I knew it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I think I'm casting it on you—I'm casting my racing
magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But that's not enough. My magic's nowhere near
complete! I need the whole world to be under my
spell!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That's why... I need to make my magic stronger!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I have to make the spell more powerful! It has to be so powerful that it works on everyone who watches! Not just you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: So how am I supposed to do that?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! All this thinking is making me hungry! More
pancakes, Familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...And if you come up with any ideas, you better
tell me.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: You're supposed to give me advice, remember!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try as hard as I can to think of a way to
strengthen this spell that's been cast on me alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What if she tried approaching the whole racing
magic idea like it was new again?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first time I felt the potential of Sweep Tosho's
magic was...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I've made up my mind. I'm gonna run. And you're
all in for a treat.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm heading to the Twinkle Series to find the
magic!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It was the first time she was genuinely interested
in the Twinkle Series. That was when she sensed
the potential of racing magic.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure it's because the Twinkle Series has
captivating, special races that fascinate both fans
and Umamusume alike.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: If those special races hold the secret to her racing magic, then...
choice_data_list: Let's try a race that's even more special!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
An extra special race? ...And what exactly does
that mean?
choice_data_list: Honestly, I don't know for sure yet...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I tell her that if we keep on going, we'll
almost certainly find our answer. And that's
because...
choice_data_list: Our next goal is the Oka Sho.
Our next goal is the Oka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a once-in-a-lifetime race into which the
competing Umamusume pour their pride, their
souls, and their strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: No matter who you ask...
choice_data_list: They'll tell you that it's one special race!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Hm. I see where you're coming from.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Well, it is true that really powerful magic needs a special incantation as well as a special place to cast it.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: So... Okay, let's go for it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna do it, Familiar! I'll run special races on
my road to the Triple Tiara...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: And perfect my racing magic along the way!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The Oka Sho is about to begin! Just which
Umamusume is going to bring home the first tiara
of the year?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Each of the competitors has made their way to
the paddock!
